docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NINIO, NISSIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIAZ, ELIZABETH DBA  NORTH BEACH MARINE CANVAS THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PARTIES REACHED A NEGOTIATED COMPRORMISE AT THE TIME THE PRODUCT WAS DELIEVERED AND PLAINTIFF RAISED THIS ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY NINIO, NISSIM AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, ELIZABETH DBA  NORTH BEACH MARINE CANVAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAY-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIAZ, ELIZABETH DBA  NORTH BEACH MARINE CANVAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARNCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS REATINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2010 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DIAZ, ELIZABETH DBA  NORTH BEACH MARINE CANVAS
